column2:
A 4-frame horizontal sprite sheet strip for a confident walk animation, rendered in a rich, hand-painted digital art style with bold black outlines and volumetric lighting, matching the visual aesthetic and character design of Capitã Maré Alta in image_bacb58.png. The background is solid white.

The Character: Capitã Maré Alta, with voluminous red hair, her distinctive large tricorn hat, and her detailed maroon and gold frock coat with rich textures, worn over a fitted leather corset and breeches, completed by tall leather boots. She maintains a commanding, confident posture throughout the movement.

CRITICAL DETAIL: Her sheathed cutlass (sword) is clearly visible and sheathed on her left hip, partially covered by the coat, and her large flintlock pistol is tucked into her sash on her right hip. Both weapons are present and visible in every frame of the walk cycle.

The Animation Cycle (4 frames - Confident Stride):

Frame 1 (Contact - Right Lead): Right leg forward, making contact with the ground; left leg back pushing off. She is mid-swagger. The sheathed cutlass sways slightly back on her left hip; the pistol is prominent on her right.

Frame 2 (Passing - Upbeat): Right foot planted, left leg is bent and swinging forward. Her body is slightly raised. The flintlock pistol on her right hip is prominently visible against the maroon fabric of her coat. Her coat tails ripple slightly.

Frame 3 (Contact - Left Lead): Left leg forward, making contact; right leg back pushing off. Symmetric opposite of Frame 1.

Frame 4 (Passing - Upbeat): Left leg planted, right leg bent and swinging forward. Her body raised, leading back into Frame 1. Both weapons are clear and anchored, with her coat tails moving gently.

The volumetric lighting highlights the rich textures of the coat and the metallic parts of the weapons, making them pop against the white background. The swagger is authoritative.

column2:
A 3-frame horizontal animation sprite sheet in a single strip against a solid white background, depicting the character PinkBob, the rustic pink-haired pirate from pinkbob_com_rum.jpg, taking rum. The art style must be a strict match to the hand-painted digital art style with bold black outlines and painterly textures seen in the reference, including the ragged clothing, and rústic skin texture.

Animation Cycle (Drinking Rum - 3 frames):

Frame 1 (Left): Preparation: PinkBob is huddled, still retaining the core pose from the reference, but the bottle of rum is raised and tilted, with the neck of the bottle held to his lips. His head is tilted back slightly. His eyes are wide, focused on the bottle with an expression of intense anticipation. The level of rum in the bottle is high.

Frame 2 (Middle): The Gulp: Head fully tilted back. The bottle is inverted, with the rum pouring. He is visibly swallowing, with his throat in motion. Gulping effect. A few stray drops of rum are airborne. The bottle is significantly lower on rum. His cheeks are slightly puffed.

Frame 3 (Right): Satisfaction/Recovery: The head is lowered back towards neutral. The bottle is lowered and held at chest level (as in the reference, but lower after drinking). He is wiping his mouth with the back of his free, un-bandaged hand, with an expression of deep pleasure, relief, and contentment. Eyes are half-closed in satisfaction. Rum level in the bottle is much lower.

The entire sequence maintains the dramatic, volumetric lighting with warm fill and rich cool-toned shadows (blue/green) seen in the reference, applied to the hand-painted textures of the ragged clothes and hair. All three poses are huddled on the white ground, with only the upper body and head moving. The three frames are perfectly aligned and spaced on a white background.

column2:
Um sprite sheet de animação horizontal de 3 quadros em uma única tira contra um fundo branco sólido, retratando a personagem Capitã Maré Alta em uma animação de "tomar rum". O estilo de arte deve corresponder rigorosamente ao estilo de arte digital pintado à mão, rico, texturizado e volumétrico com contornos pretos ousados, mantendo sua aparência distinta: cabelos ruivos volumosos, chapéu tricórnio, casaco de capitão marrom com bordados dourados, corpete e botas altas. A espada está embainhada em sua cintura em todos os frames para permitir que ela segure a garrafa com uma mão e limpe a boca com a outra.


Sequência de Animação (3 quadros):


Quadro 1 (Esquerda): Preparação. A Capitã Maré Alta está em uma pose de pé, segurando a garrafa de rum "GROG" (idêntica à referência) perto de seus lábios com uma mão, olhando para ela com uma expressão de antecipação desafiadora. A garrafa está cheia. Sua outra mão está livre e posicionada para limpar a boca.


Quadro 2 (Centro): O Gole. A cabeça da capitã está inclinada drasticamente para trás. A garrafa "GROG" é erguida alto e invertida, com rum (um líquido âmbar texturizado) visivelmente fluindo para sua boca aberta. Seus olhos estão fechados ou semicerrados em foco dramático. A garrafa está significativamente mais vazia.


Quadro 3 (Direita): Satisfação. A cabeça da capitã está abaixada, olhando para a garrafa. A garrafa "GROG" (agora visivelmente perto de vazia) é abaixada para o nível do peito. Ela usa as costas de sua mão livre para limpar a boca com uma expressão de satisfação e prazer, com um sorriso de escárnio leve. Seu cabelo ruivo está ligeiramente emaranhado com o movimento da cabeça.


Toda a sequência é iluminada volumetricamente para destacar as texturas do casaco, cabelo e garrafa. Os 3 frames estão perfeitamente alinhados e espaçados em um fundo branco puro.

column2:
A full-body 2D character sprite of a robust and experienced female NPC deckhand from Capitã Maré Alta's crew, rendered in a rich, hand-painted digital art style with deep, painterly textures and bold, expressive black outlines, strictly matching the rugged and volumetric finish seen in the reference image. The deckhand stands firmly on her feet in a practical work pose, looking forward with a focused, experienced expression on her dark, weathered face. She has thick, practical dark brown hair styled in heavy braids and mostly covered by a faded, coarse canvas bandana (blue-green).

Her attire is functional work clothing: a rugged, off-white linen work shirt with sleeves rolled up, revealing muscular, sun-darkened arms, under a heavy canvas work vest (brown-green) with utilitarian pockets and simple brass buttons. A wide leather belt with simple brass buckles holds tools like a marlinspike, a coil of thin rope, and small pouches. She wears tough, knee-length heavy canvas breeches (dark gray) and robust, salt-worn leather deck boots. Stains of sea salt, tar, and rust are visible on her clothes. She holds a rustic, rough-hewn wooden deck brush with thick bristles in one hand, resting it on the white ground, and holds a section of thick, tarred rope over her shoulder with the other hand. A small section of thick rope is looped over her shoulder. The lighting is dramatic and warm, highlighting the tactile textures of the fabric, rope, wood, and skin against the solid white background. The full body is visible.

column2:
A 3-frame horizontal animation sprite sheet strip against a solid white background, depicting the character Elizabeth from reference image. The art style strictly matches the rich, hand-painted digital illustration style with bold black outlines, deep textures, and volumetric lighting seen in the reference.

The Character (Elizabeth):
A Black female pirate with deep, dark skin and matted, voluminous, unkempt dark brown hair that falls around her shoulders, identical in texture to the reference. She retains her tattered teal (maroon/navy) frock coat over an off-white blouse, brown trousers, heavy boots, and her distinct dark glass 'GROG' rum bottle with its specific label and wrapped neck. She has bandaged hands and holds the bottle. Her expression is changed from paranoid fixity to one of confident, open laughter and manic happiness, with wide eyes and a broad, open-mouthed laugh.

The Animation (3 Horizontal Frames):

Frame 1 (Preparation): Elizabeth stands full-body and confidently on the white ground plane, looking directly at the viewer with a broad, open-mouthed, laughing expression. Her body is in an open, confident stance. She holds the dark 'GROG' rum bottle (full) in one hand, ready to drink, and is smiling manically.

Frame 2 (The Gulp): Her head is tilted dramatically back, exposing her throat. The 'GROG' bottle is inverted and held high against her lips, with dark, textured rum (amber liquid) visibly pouring into her open, accepting mouth. She is swallowing greedily, showing movement in her neck. Her eyes are closed or rolled back in intense, gratified focus. The bottle is half-empty. Her hair swings with the head movement.

Frame 3 (Satisfaction): Her head is lowered back to base level, still laughing. The 'GROG' bottle (now visibly near empty) is lowered to chest level, held tightly. She uses the back of her other bandaged hand to wipe her mouth, with an expression of deep, manic satisfaction and pleasure, still smiling and looking out. Her matted hair settles. The full body is visibe in all frames, aligned horizontally, perfectly spaced against the pure white background. Dramatic volumetric lighting highlights the matted hair and tattered clothes against the white.

column2:
A wide-angle digital illustration of a luxurious pirate harbor environment. The setting is a lavish port built on a lush tropical island, illuminated by a vibrant, golden sunset. The docks themselves are highly ornate, constructed from polished dark wood heavily accented with gleaming white marble and intricate gold brasswork. Elegant market stalls draped in rich silks and opulent balconies with decorative warm-glowing lamps adorn the surrounding shoreline architecture.

Two distinct pirate ships are docked side-by-side at these docks. The first ship, positioned on the left and center, is a giant, magnificent galleon. Its hull is crafted from polished dark wood embellished with deep pink paint and gold filigree. It features massive masts carrying opulent, heavy pink velvet sails and is armed with shining golden brass cannons. Positioned to its right is the second ship, which is visibly smaller and significantly less luxurious. Its hull is made of rough, weathered, and battle-scarred dark wood. It features furled, patched canvas sails in faded earthy tones, creating a stark, rustic contrast to the opulence of the larger ship.

A thick, plush red velvet carpet extends diagonally across the docks, starting near the ships and leading down towards the bottom right corner of the frame. This path is elegantly flanked by ornate, burning brass fire torches. At the very end of the red carpet, near the bottom right edge, an ornate polished wooden sign with gold accents is mounted on a post, clearly reading "MANSÃO" in elegant golden calligraphy. In the background, lush, textured green hills rise toward the sunset sky, and the imposing silhouette of a large, detailed mansion is visible on the distant right peak. The art style is detailed and immersive, resembling high-end video game environment concept art.

The image exhibits a digital painting aesthetic with a focus on detailed rendering and environment-driven fantasy illustration. Color hues are rich and deeply saturated, employing a palette dominated by warm golden sunset tones, deep polished browns, and the striking pink and red accents of the galleon and carpet. Lighting is dramatic and volumetric, utilizing strong directional golden light from the setting sun and deep, cool-toned shadows to give the architecture, ships, and water a three-dimensional, sculpted quality and emphasize material textures. The rendering quality is high, featuring sharp details in the wood grain, metallic reflections on the brasswork, and the heavy folds of the velvet. Brushwork, though digitally applied, suggests traditional painting techniques, with noticeable texture variations and bold, expressive black outlines defining the forms. The overall mood is adventurous, wealthy, and highly stylized.

column6:
Precisei dar um reforço usando o estilo de prompt do whiskey novamente: 

Vou te dar um exemplo de como construir o estilo visual que estou buscando, e então vou querer que você faça o mesmo para a cena do porto.

Exemplo:

A full-body digital illustration of a male pirate character standing against a plain white background. The character appears to be a man in his 30s or 40s with a fair skin tone. He has bright, fiery red hair and a matching full beard, giving him a somewhat rugged look. He is wearing a typical pirate outfit. His head is adorned with a black tricorn hat, slightly cocked to one side, with gold trim and possibly a small skull or decorative element visible on the front.

He is dressed in a long, dark blue or slate-colored naval coat with golden buttons and red lining visible at the collar. Underneath the coat, he wears a white, somewhat ruffled shirt. His lower body is covered by striped trousers, featuring vertical alternating stripes of dark blue/black and light blue/white. He is wearing dark brown leather boots that reach approximately mid-calf.

The pirate is holding a dark glass bottle in his left hand, which is labeled with the word "RUM" and features a skull and crossbones emblem, suggesting a potent or dangerous beverage. His pose is frontal and confident, with his legs slightly spread and his expression showing a slight, mischievous smile. The art style is detailed and somewhat realistic, resembling character concept art or a video game character model.

The image exhibits a digital painting aesthetic with a focus on detailed rendering and character-driven fantasy illustration. The style is reminiscent of concept art or high-quality video game assets. Color hues are rich and slightly muted, employing a palette dominated by deep blues, browns, and earthy tones, contrasted by warm accents like the reddish-orange in the beard. Lighting is dramatic and directional, utilizing strong highlights and deep shadows to give figures a three-dimensional, sculpted quality and emphasize texture. The rendering quality is high, featuring sharp details, particularly in facial features and fabric textures, which have a rough, worn appearance. Brushwork, though digitally applied, suggests traditional painting techniques, with noticeable texture variations in the shadows and mid-tones. The overall mood is adventurous and stylized, with a slight exaggeration of features common in character design. The background is pure white, creating a cutout effect that emphasizes the subject and suggests an illustrative or reference context rather than a natural environment.

column3:
A front-on, detailed digital painting environment asset of the main entrance to João Feijão’s Mansion (as seen in the background of). The scene is from a ground-level viewpoint, looking slightly up at the massive front door, just before entry. The artwork features bold, expressive black outlines and rich, hand-painted textures, strictly matching the gritty, tactile, and highly detailed concept art model style seen in the character reference. Forms are sculpted and three-dimensional, with rich, deeply saturated colors dominated by warm golden hues and contrasting cool blue-green shadows, especially in the recessed area under the portico.

The central focus is an imposing, deeply textured double door made of dark, heavily weathered wood, studded with extensive hand-wrought iron hardware and filigree. It has large, elaborate dark metal pull-handles and a complex, weathered brass lockplate. The door is set within a grand, weathered plaster archway with ornate dark wood and detailed stone trim (as suggested by the mansion reference architecture). Flanking the door are two massive, ornate brass lamps with warm-glowing, flickering flames that cast dramatic volumetric lighting with strong highlights and deep, textured shadows across the weathered walls. Above the door is a detailed balcony with an intricate iron railing, with vines creeping up the wall. A sculpted, stylized motif of João Feijão's favorite object or unique pirate motif is set into the stone above the arch. A polished, slightly weathered wooden plaque next to the door features elegant golden calligraphy reading: **"MANSÃO DO JOÃO FEIJÃO"** or just **"MANSÃO"**, clearly legible. The ground consists of polished wood and marble tiles showing wear. The background beyond the portico is in deep shadow. The overall feel is wealthy yet tactile and lived-in.

column3:
Aqui está o prompt de texto detalhado para a arte do cenário da porta da mansão, ajustado para refletir o seu rascunho e a atmosfera de "terror abandonado chique", mantendo o estilo visual de PinkBob.

***

**Prompt de Geração de Imagem (Cenário de Jogo - Porta da Mansão):**

Uma ilustração frontal detalhada do cenário da entrada principal da Mansão do João Feijão, vista do nível do solo, logo antes da entrada. A estrutura é uma versão desbotada e deteriorada da mansão de madeira escura ornamentada e chique vista em `Porto_ep2_final.jpg`, agora carcomida por traças e coberta por teias de aranha espessas e poeira, criando uma vibe de terror e abandono chique. A iluminação é volumétrica e fraca, vinda de um céu noturno nublado, com névoa rastejante. O estilo de arte é arte digital pintada à mão com contornos pretos ousados, texturas rústicas e detalhadas e renderização de alta qualidade, semelhante a concept art ou assets de jogos de alta qualidade, condizente com o personagem PinkBob em `pinkbob_com_rum.jpg`.

**Integração do Rascunho:**
A entrada central, incluindo o arco acima e a porta dupla, é moldada como uma caveira gigante e assustadora. O arco de madeira acima da porta forma os olhos vazios e a cavidade nasal da caveira. Pequenas janelas estreitas e escuras e teias de aranha enchem essas cavidades.

**Detalhes da Porta:**
A porta dupla central é de madeira escura e rústica, coberta por ferragens de ferro forjado pesado e oxidado. Há puxadores de metal que parecem garras e um ferrolho complexo e corroído. O prompt deve incluir a placa solicitada anteriormente, agora desbotada e corroída. Ela é feita de madeira e brass dourado oxidado, com caligrafia dourada e elegante, agora desbotada e corroída, lendo: **"MANSÃO DO JOÃO FEIJÃO"** ou apenas **"MANSÃO"**, quase ilegível.

**Decoração e Atmosfera:**
Lâmpadas de metal ornamentadas e desmoronadas estão penduradas, sem luz, cobertas por poeira. A vegetação selvagem e espinhosa cresce nas frestas da madeira e da pedra carcomida. Teias de aranha espessas cobrem a placa desbotada. O chão de madeira polida está empenado e coberto de poeira e detritos. Uma videira de espinhos cresce em torno do ferrolho corroído. A vibe geral é de luxo que sucumbiu ao terror e ao tempo.

***

**English Text Prompt for Other AI:**

A detailed front-on digital environment background illustration of the main entrance to João Feijão’s Mansion, viewed from a ground-level perspective, right before entry. The scene is a faded, decaying, moth-eaten and dust-covered version of the ornate, chic dark wood architecture seen in `Porto_ep2_final.jpg`, creating a sense of horror and abandoned luxury. The lighting is weak, cool, and dramatic volumetric light from a cloudy night sky, with low-creeping mist and deep textured shadows. The art style features bold, expressive black outlines, rich hand-painted textures, and high-quality volumetric rendering, similar to concept art or high-end game assets, consistent with the visual aesthetic of the character PinkBob in `pinkbob_com_rum.jpg`.

The central entrance, including the archway above and the double door, is explicitly shaped like a giant, imposing skull. The wooden archway above the doors forms the wide, empty eyes and nasal cavity of the skull. Small, dark, narrow windows and thick cobwebs fill these cavities. The central double doors are made of dark, weathered wood heavily studded with extensive, oxidized wrought iron hardware and filigree. Large, ornate metal pull-handles that resemble claws and a complex, corroded iron bolt mechanism are present.

An ornate, corroded, faded brass plaque is mounted next to the door with once-elegant golden calligraphy, now faded and corroded, reading: **"MANSÃO DO JOÃO FEIJÃO"** or just **"MANSÃO"**, barely legible through dust and cobwebs. Ornate, dilapidated metal lamps are hung, unlit and covered in dust. Wild, thorny, unkempt vegetation grows through cracks in the aged wood and stone. A thick cobweb covers the faded sign. The floor of polished wood is warped and covered in dust and debris. A thorny vine wraps around the corroded ironwork. The overall mood is luxurious yet terrifying and decayed.

column2:
A strictly head-on, eye-level digital environment background illustration of the main entrance to João Feijão’s luxurious but abandoned pirate mansion. The scene is a direct, straight-on frontal view of the skull-shaped doorway, perfectly centered and balanced within the frame, with all architectural lines parallel and no vertical distortion, as if viewed straight-on at eye level. The structure is composed of ornate, dark wood and weathered stone, showcasing a faded, moth-eaten grandeur. The architectural design is uniquely terrifying: the central entrance, including the upper archway and the double doors below, is explicitly shaped to form the visage of a giant, symmetrical skull. The large wooden archway above the doors, now directly in front of the viewer, forms the wide, empty eye sockets and nasal cavity of the skull, which are filled with small, dark, shattered window panes and thick, heavy cobwebs.

The central double doors sit perfectly flat and centered beneath the archway, acting as the lower structure of the skull. They are made of dark, heavily weathered, and warped wood, studded with extensive, oxidized wrought iron hardware and elaborate, rusted filigree. They feature large, ornate metal pull-handles designed to resemble twisted, skeletal claws, along with a complex, severely corroded iron locking mechanism. Flanking the doors, the once-chic plaster and polished wood trim is peeling, cracked, and decayed, exposing the rotting stonework and structural beams underneath.

Mounted on the wall symmetrically next to the door is an ornate, heavily corroded brass plaque. It bears once-elegant golden calligraphy that is now faded and barely legible through layers of dust and spiderwebs, reading "MANSÃO DO JOÃO FEIJÃO". Unlit, dilapidated metal lanterns hang crookedly and symmetrically from the walls, caked in grime and rust. Wild, thorny, unkempt vegetation and creeping dead vines force their way through cracks in the aged wood and the warped, dusty floorboards that fill the bottom horizontal foreground. The scene is strictly frontal, with all elements aligned symmetrically against the deep shadows of the mansion’s recessed entrance.

The image exhibits a digital painting aesthetic with a focus on detailed rendering and environment-driven fantasy illustration. The style is reminiscent of high-quality video game concept art, featuring bold, expressive black outlines and rich, tactile textures (consistent with the visual aesthetic of the character PinkBob reference). Color hues are deep but muted by decay, employing a palette dominated by cool, eerie blues and sickly greens from a cloudy night sky, contrasting with the dark browns, grays, and rusted oranges of the rotting wood and metal. Lighting is dramatic and volumetric, utilizing low-creeping mist and strong, directional moonlight to cast deep, textured shadows, giving the architecture a three-dimensional, sculpted quality. The rendering quality is high, featuring sharp details in the rough wood grain, the flaking rust, and the delicate threads of the cobwebs. Brushwork, though digitally applied, suggests traditional painting techniques, with noticeable texture variations emphasizing the rough, worn, and abandoned appearance. The overall mood is terrifying, melancholic, and highly stylized, blending ruined luxury with pirate horror.

column2:
A strictly frontal, eye-level digital illustration of an environment background, specifically the main entrance lobby of a pirate mansion. The scene is viewed straight-on immediately after crossing the threshold. In stark contrast to its terrifying, decayed exterior, the interior is in immaculate, pristine condition, fully renovated to resemble a high-end, corporate luxury headquarters. The architecture is perfectly symmetrical, featuring smooth, pristine white walls and flawless, polished dark wood paneling without a single speck of dust, cobweb, or decay.

The floor is constructed from expansive slabs of highly polished, highly reflective black marble, intricately inlaid with gleaming, pristine gold brass geometric patterns. The lighting is anachronistically modern but warm, featuring sleek, recessed LED cove lighting in the ceiling and immaculate, polished brass and minimalist glass chandeliers. The furniture is ultra-minimalist and elegant, utilizing modern materials like polished black leather and brushed steel, blending a sterile corporate aesthetic with pirate wealth.

In the exact center sits a sleek reception desk carved from a single block of flawless white marble, topped with tempered glass and an anachronistically modern, minimalist computer terminal. Mounted on the immaculate wall directly behind the desk is a gleaming, perfectly polished brass sign with clean, modern sans-serif typography that reads clearly: "RECEPCIONISTA", and just below it, "BEM-VINDO AO PATRIMÔNIO HISTÓRICO - RESTAURADO COM PERFEIÇÃO". Flanking the desk are sterile, minimalist glass display cubes resting on the floor, containing ridiculously over-polished pirate artifacts, like a gleaming silver hook with a neat corporate label. A pristine, gilded ship's wheel hangs symmetrically on the wall as abstract corporate art.

The image exhibits a digital painting aesthetic with a focus on detailed rendering and environment-driven fantasy illustration. The style is reminiscent of high-quality video game concept art, maintaining the bold, expressive black outlines and rich, tactile painting style of the character references, but ingeniously applied to immaculate, reflective surfaces rather than rugged ones. column2: Uma pintura digital de interior detalhada e atmosférica, de uma perspectiva frontal-inferior olhando para cima, para o alojamento da tripulação no porão inferior do galeão pirata 'Pérola Rosa', respeitando exatamente o ângulo de câmera e a perspectiva do layout de referência. O porão cavernoso de madeira rústica e maciça é dramaticamente iluminado por lanternas de óleo quentes e tremeluzentes penduradas nas vigas. O foco central-esquerdo é a escada de madeira rústica que sobe da base inferior esquerda em direção ao centro superior do teto, levando a uma escotilha circular com grade de ferro e ferragens complexas, onde a luz do sol do convés superior penetra. Na área inferior esquerda, barris de suprimentos e caixas envoltas em cordas estão empilhados. Pendurada elaboradamente entre as vigas do teto, no centro-esquerda, está uma rede de dormir luxuosa e super chique feita de cetim importado da Arábia com padrões complexos em bordeaux, ouro e turquesa, forrada com tecidos de seda e almofadas de veludo de pelúcia. Um pirata super elegante está dormindo profundamente nesta rede de cetim, vestido com um casaco de veludo rico bordeaux com bordados de ouro, uma camisa de seda com babados e um lenço de pescoço de seda. Sua barba bem cuidada é visível e ele está coberto por um lençol de seda. Abaixo da rede, no chão de tábuas de madeira polida, está um baú de tesouro super chique e destrancado feito de madeira escura com incrustações de marfim, madrepérola e ouro polido, com suas ferragens de bronze ornamentadas destrancadas. A tampa está ligeiramente aberta, revelando brilhos de joias, moedas de ouro e rolos de seda. Ao lado do baú, as botas do pirata de couro de jacaré texturizado estão no chão; elas são de cano alto com fivelas de bronze, polidas e bem cuidadas. O resto da cena apresenta mais redes penduradas, barris, efeitos de tripulação e ferramentas, criando um porão denso, mas opulento. A atmosfera é calma, com o suave ranger do navio. Estilo de pintura digital realista e de alta definição com cores profundas e ricas e texturas meticulosas.

column7: Uma pintura digital de interior extremamente elegante, detalhada e extravagante da cabine pessoal do Capitão Barba Rosa no porão de seu navio, baseada integralmente no ângulo de câmera e layout de referência. A rústica escada de madeira pesada sobe do centro-esquerda em direção ao centro superior do teto, onde a luz do convés superior penetra através da escotilha circular com grade de ferro. As vigas e paredes rústicas do porão foram revestidas com painéis de madeira de nogueira polida e molduras de ouro ornamentadas, com cortinas de veludo rosa profundo e carmesim penduradas em ganchos dourados. No centro-direita, uma massiva e luxuosa mesa de capitão em madeira polida com incrustações de ouro, marfim e madrepérola está cheia de mapas náuticos (alguns marcados com caligrafia dourada e rosa, como 'TESOURO DE 2142'), bússolas de latão, tinteiros dourados com penas de pavão e uma lamparina de óleo dourada. As paredes estão *repletas de artefatos piratas decorativos* e coleções: cutelos e floretes gravados, pistolas de pederneira incrustadas de joias, canecas de rum de ouro, estátuas de bronze de criaturas marinhas e ídolos astecas. Na parede atrás da mesa do capitão, entre prateleiras douradas de artefatos, está um grande, ornamentado e detalhado quadro a óleo com moldura de ouro maciço. O quadro retrata, lado a lado, o Capitão Barba Rosa (com sua barba vermelha distinta, casaco carmesim e ouro, e chapéu tricornio, como em `image_122f03.png`) e PinkBob (em seu casaco bordeaux e ouro com babados brancos, calças listradas, e aparência tattered/ruidosa, como em `image_122f03.png`), ambos sorrindo e segurando garrafas de RUM. No canto inferior esquerdo do quadro, a data **2142** está escrita em caligrafia dourada nítida. Embaixo da massiva mesa do capitão, no chão de tábuas de madeira polida cobertas por tapetes persas em tons de rosa e ouro, está um cofre de tesouro super chique e destrancado feito de madeira escura com incrustações de marfim, madrepérola e ouro polido, com suas ferragens de bronze ornamentadas destrancadas e o brasão do Barba Rosa visível. A tampa está ligeiramente aberta, revelando brilhos de joias, moedas de ouro e rolos de seda. Mais redes penduradas (agora de cetim rosa e ouro), barris (revestidos de couro rosa e ouro), e artefatos preenchem o densamente decorado porão. A atmosfera é quente, rica e tremeluzente com luz de lamparinas de óleo douradas penduradas. Estilo de pintura digital realista e de alta definição com cores profundas e ricas e texturas meticulosas.

column5: Seguindo essa mesma estrutura de criação de prompts em inglês, e baseando-se no story spine do jogo e estilo artistico da imagem referência, quero que você crie o prompt para o personagem "Seu zé" que será um vendedor de especiarias que trabalha em sua barraca no porto. column2:
A full-body digital illustration of "Seu Zé", an older, weathered man in his late 50s/60s, with deep olive skin and a grey-streaked Arabian-style beard. He wears traditional, opulent Arabian silk garments in rich jewel tones: a long, flowing deep bordeaux and indigo-patterned thobe layered over a cream silk tunic. Around his head is a complex bordeaux and teal patterned silk turban with a brass spice scoop tucked in. He has multiple brass rings, large brass bracelets, a heavy brass necklace with spice containers, leather spice pouches, and ornate leather/brass sandals. He holds his woven spice basket containing vibrant colored powders (saffron, curry, cinnamon). The art style features bold, expressive black outlines and rich, hand-painted textures with volumetric rendering and dramatic directional shadows.

Sprite Sheet Layout:
A 3-frame horizontal strip of character sprites, clearly separated, against a solid, pure white background (absolute zero environment).

Animation Sequence (3 Frames - Inspection):

Frame 1: Preparation (Base Pose): Seu Zé stands confidently, holding the woven spice basket in his right arm. He holds the loose brass spice scoop (now in his left hand, removed from turban) poised just above the basket, looking down at the colorful powders with a contemplative, serious gaze. He is preparing to scoop a sample.

Frame 2: The Scoop (Action Pose): He leans slightly forward, dipping the brass scoop deep into the basket (specifically into the bright yellow saffron/curry section). His face is focused. He lifts the scoop up, filled with colorful powder, bringing it towards his mid-chest.

Frame 3: Visual & Olfactory Analysis (Inspection Pose): He brings the scoop very close to his face, below his nose. He has tilted his head back slightly and closed one eye, deeply inhaling or squinting to inspect the color and texture of the spice in the scoop. His other hand secures the basket. A slight smile begins to form on his face, indicating approval.

Output Constraints: Full body sprites. Bold outlines. Hand-painted textures. White background. No scenario elements. Three distinct, sequential frames. High resolution.

The object is a fusion of a fierce, divine mask and an aged, horizontal wood base, designed as a mystical and ancient artifact. The main central mask is bronze-gold, with fierce and divine features, presenting bulging cheeks, puffed nostrils, fangs, and narrowed eyes in an expression of power. A vertical third eye is positioned on the forehead, and the crown is adorned with a Vajra symbol (ritualistic thunderbolt) and other mystical markings. The mask is mounted atop an aged, horizontally textured wood base, imitating weathered driftwood with marks of wear and cracks.

The sides of the wood base are covered by complex bundles of colored fabrics (red, blue, beige), metal rings, and rope bindings. Below the mask and wood base, there is a complex web of braided cords, beaded chains (bronze, turquoise, gold), and hanging amulets. Various gold and bronze metal charms are interspersed, and fabric fringes (beige, brown) hang down from the complex arrangement. A row of large, worn metal coins and a cluster of turquoise beads and gold discs are also suspended. The texture of all materials—metal, wood, fabric—is highly rendered, showing age and rustic wear.

The object is presented in a full frontal view, centered in the composition, against a plain white background. The composition is symmetrical and balanced. The illustration style is highly detailed and somewhat realistic, resembling high-quality character concept art or video game asset design. The image is central on the white canvas, creating a cutout effect that emphasizes the subject and suggests an illustrative context rather than a natural environment. The complex, interwoven cords and beaded hangings create a sense of scale and depth.

The image exhibits a digital painting aesthetic with a focus on detailed rendering and object-driven fantasy illustration. The style is reminiscent of concept art or high-quality video game assets. Color hues are rich and rustic, dominated by tones of gold, bronze, turquoise, deep blue, and terracota red, with earthier wood tones. Lighting is dramatic and directional, utilizing strong highlights and deep shadows to give the object a three-dimensional, sculpted quality and emphasize texture. The rendering quality is high, featuring sharp details, particularly in metal carvings and fabric textures, which have a rough, worn appearance. Brushwork, though digitally applied, suggests traditional painting techniques, with noticeable texture variations in the shadows and mid-tones. The overall mood is ancient, mystical, and stylized, with a slight exaggeration of features common in object design.
column5:
Por favor, faça o prompt EM TEXTO do objeto seguindo essa estrutura de exemplo de como construir um prompt:

A full-body digital illustration of a male pirate character standing against a plain white background. The character appears to be a man in his 30s or 40s with a fair skin tone. He has bright, fiery red hair and a matching full beard, giving him a somewhat rugged look. He is wearing a typical pirate outfit. His head is adorned with a black tricorn hat, slightly cocked to one side, with gold trim and possibly a small skull or decorative element visible on the front.

He is dressed in a long, dark blue or slate-colored naval coat with golden buttons and red lining visible at the collar. Underneath the coat, he wears a white, somewhat ruffled shirt. His lower body is covered by striped trousers, featuring vertical alternating stripes of dark blue/black and light blue/white. He is wearing dark brown leather boots that reach approximately mid-calf.

The pirate is holding a dark glass bottle in his left hand, which is labeled with the word "RUM" and features a skull and crossbones emblem, suggesting a potent or dangerous beverage. His pose is frontal and confident, with his legs slightly spread and his expression showing a slight, mischievous smile. The art style is detailed and somewhat realistic, resembling character concept art or a video game character model. The image is cropped with black bars on the left and right, framing the central illustration.

The image exhibits a digital painting aesthetic with a focus on detailed rendering and character-driven fantasy illustration. The style is reminiscent of concept art or high-quality video game assets. Color hues are rich and slightly muted, employing a palette dominated by deep blues, browns, and earthy tones, contrasted by warm accents like the reddish-orange in the beard. Lighting is dramatic and directional, utilizing strong highlights and deep shadows to give figures a three-dimensional, sculpted quality and emphasize texture. The rendering quality is high, featuring sharp details, particularly in facial features and fabric textures, which have a rough, worn appearance. Brushwork, though digitally applied, suggests traditional painting techniques, with noticeable texture variations in the shadows and mid-tones. The overall mood is adventurous and stylized, with a slight exaggeration of features common in character design. The background is pure white, creating a cutout effect that emphasizes the subject and suggests an illustrative or reference context rather than a natural environment.

column2:
A detailed digital illustration of Captain Pinkbeard's open magical compass, centered and filling the entire frame against a plain white background. It is made of ornate, deeply engraved aged gold and has a highly stylized, Baroque appearance. The compass is shown from a direct top-down perspective to display both the exterior of the open lid and the intricate compass face, ensuring no part of the object is cropped out or touches the edge of the image.

The exterior of the heavy gold case is heavily adorned with intricate, hand-chiseled engravings. These carvings depict stylized roaring ocean waves, Kraken tentacles, intertwined mermaids with pink tails, pirate skulls featuring prominent mustaches, and ship wheels. The gold has a rich, textured patina with polished highlights on the raised details, contrasted by dark oxidation in the grooves. The open lid features a deeply sculpted relief of a full-rigged galleon with pink flags flying from the masts.

Inside the compass, the face is an absolute masterpiece of magical art under a protective glass dome. The needle is not a standard arrow but a stylized, glowing bone arrow that pulsates with an internal bordeaux-pink magical energy, pointing towards a swirling arcane vortex instead of standard cardinal directions. Standard cardinal letters (N, S, E, W) are replaced by glowing pink runic symbols and glyphs. The background of the dial appears to contain a miniature, swirling galaxy of pink cosmic dust and tiny, winking stars.

On the inner rim of the casing, near the hinge, the words "PROPERTY OF CAPTAIN PINKBEARD" are elegantly engraved in a cursive script with small pink ruby inlays for punctuation. The robust hinge mechanism is adorned with a single, large, glowing pink gemstone that emits a soft light across the compass face. The overall construction feels ancient, heavy, and extremely valuable.

The image exhibits a high-end digital painting aesthetic with a focus on detailed rendering and environment-driven fantasy illustration. The style is reminiscent of top-tier concept art or detailed video game inventory assets. Color hues are rich and luxurious, dominated by deep aged gold tones, warm brass accents, and vibrant, glowing pink magical effects, contrasted by deep bordeaux shadows.

Lighting is dramatic and directional, utilizing strong highlights and deep shadows (chiaroscuro) to give the Golden object a strong three-dimensional, sculpted quality and emphasize the varied textures of etched metal, polished gems, glowing magic, and smooth glass. The rendering quality is high, featuring sharp details on every tiny engraving and magical effect. Brushwork, though digitally applied, suggests traditional painting techniques with noticeable texture variations in the shadows and mid-tones.

The overall mood is magical, mysterious, opulent, and adventurous. The background is pure, seamless white, creating a powerful cutout effect that makes the detailed magical gold compass pop and suggests a reference or illustrative context. The composition is centered, balanced, and perfectly framed.
column5: Seguindo a mesma estrutura de prompt de texto, faça o prompt para uma bússola mágica que pertença ao capitão barba rosa. Ela é toda engravada, feita de ouro e bem estilizada, além disso ela está com a tampa aberta. A bússola deve estar em um fundo branco, virada de frente para a camera. column2:
A full-body digital illustration sprite sheet of the male pirate character, "Barba Rosa", based on image_15e945.png, walking against a plain pure white background. The sprite sheet features three distinct frames arranged horizontally in sequence, capturing a determination walk cycle in a lateral (profile or three-quarter) view. The character retains all details from image_15e945.png: the bright, fiery red hair and full matching beard; the black tricorn hat with gold trim and prominent red feather; the white ruffled shirt, tattered blue naval coat with red lining, red sash, striped blue/white/red trousers, and dark brown leather boots.

The walk cycle is defined by the following frames:

Frame 1 (Contact Right): The character's right foot is forward and flat on the ground, supporting the weight. The left leg is back with the toe just touching the ground. The character's right arm is swinging back, while the left arm (holding the dark glass "RUM" bottle with the skull label) is swinging forward slightly. The body is upright and moving forward.

Frame 2 (Passing): The left foot is moving directly under the body, swinging forward. The right foot is planted and pushing off. Both arms are passing near the body, with the hand holding the rum bottle near the hip and the right hand swinging forward.

Frame 3 (Contact Left): The character's left foot is forward and flat on the ground. The right leg is back with the toe touching. The right arm is swinging forward, and the left arm (holding the rum bottle) is swinging back slightly.

The image exhibits a digital painting aesthetic with detailed rendering and high-quality character illustration matching image_15e945.png. Lighting is dramatic and directional, utilizing strong highlights and deep shadows to give the moving figure a three-dimensional, sculpted quality and emphasize texture. The color palette remains rich and saturated, dominated by deep blues, browns, and earthy tones, contrasted by warm red accents in the beard, feather, and trousers. The background is pure white for a cutout effect, emphasizing the subject and suggesting an illustrative context for animation.

column2:
A detailed, full-object digital illustration of an ornate bunch of keys, specifically the master cabin keys for the luxurious galleon "Pink Pearl", centered against a plain pure white background. The object is presented as a high-end, impeccably maintained artifact, completely filling the center of the frame without any parts cut off. The composition is focused entirely on the keys, acting as a premium inventory item or concept art asset.

The keychain features a thick, highly polished gold ring. Hanging from the ring is a heavy, ornate fob crafted from gilded brass and polished dark wood, bearing the raised, intricate emblem of the "Pink Pearl"—a stylized rose intertwined with a subtle skull and crossbones. Attached to the ring are three distinct, elegant keys. Unlike typical pirate items, these keys are not rusty or weathered; instead, they are meticulously clean and well-kept. They are made of gleaming brass and polished silver, featuring complex, intricate wards and elaborate bow designs resembling baroque rococo filigree. A small, pristine tassel made of rich pink and bordeaux velvet hangs elegantly from the ring, adding a touch of extravagant pirate opulence.

The image exhibits a high-resolution digital painting aesthetic with a strong focus on detailed rendering and object-driven fantasy illustration. The style is reminiscent of high-quality video game concept art or premium UI inventory assets. Color hues are rich and saturated, dominated by the gleaming metallic tones of polished gold, bright silver, and warm brass, contrasted by the deep bordeaux and pink of the velvet tassel. Lighting is clean, dramatic, and directional, utilizing strong volumetric highlights to emphasize the metallic shine and deep, crisp shadows to give the keys a three-dimensional, sculpted quality. The rendering quality is exceptional, featuring sharp details on the metal engravings, the smooth wood of the fob, and the soft texture of the tassel. The background is pure white, creating a precise cutout effect that emphasizes the subject and suggests an illustrative reference context rather than a natural environment.

column2: A wide-angle, full-environment digital illustration of a stylized "Centro de Pesquisa" (Research Center) environment set against a caribean background, creating a precise cutout effect. The perspective is a flat frontal view, identically matching the camera angle and layout seen in doca.png. On the serene Caribbean beach, a stationary pirate-era sailing ship, showing slight wear and weathered details, is moored to a small section of the raised wooden dock structure precisely where the ships are located in doca.png. Surrounding cliffs and sparse vegetation are visible on the left and behind the central building, consistent with doca.png. In the exact center of the composition, the main central building structure is defined as the entrance to a greenhouse. The facade of this section is covered in large panes of grimy glass set into dark wood frames, housing exotic, lush tropical plants visible through the glass panels. A prominent wooden sign hangs above the main double doors, painted in weathered Portuguese lettering reading: "ESTUFA DO DR. B. CHEN." To the right of the central building, a dark, rocky path leads up via stone steps, identically matching the reference composition. This path disappears into a dense, sprawling Caribbean tropical forest that dominates the right side of the frame with deep green foliage and shadows. Post at the edge of this forest path, another sturdy wooden sign is clearly visible, reading in Portuguese: "ACESSO À FLORESTA TROPICAL." The image exhibits a digital painting aesthetic with a focus on detailed rendering and environment-driven fantasy illustration. The style is reminiscent of concept art or high-quality video game assets. Color hues are rich and slightly muted, employing a palette dominated by deep bordeaux, dark blues, and earthy browns for the wooden structures and ship, contrasted by the rich, deep greens of the dense forest foliage and the vibrant turquoise of the water. Lighting is dramatic and directional (chiaroscuro), utilizing strong highlights on the weathered wood and the greenhouse glass, and casting deep, textured shadows within the forest area to give the scene a three-dimensional, sculpted quality and emphasize texture. The rendering quality is high, featuring sharp details on the weathered wood grain, the stone steps, and individual leaf textures, all having a rough, worn appearance. Brushwork, though digitally applied, suggests traditional painting techniques, with noticeable texture variations in the shadows and mid-tones. The overall mood is mysterious and adventurous, with a stylized representation common in game environment design.
column5:

É *EXTREMAMENTE* IMPORTANTE que o angulo de camera seja idêntico ao da imagem de referência.
